title: DUziCraft - BabyMobs
description: Improve the look of the classic minecraft babies!
body:
![Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/491f67eba25cc744bee552de07e7759606e702bd.webp)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_LwGqVnb6bk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Entity Texture Features (EMF) & Entity Model Features (EMF) (or Optifine) ARE REQUIRED!

This is based on [DUziCraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/d-uzi-craft/) by Uzi for Bedrock Edition, and is a port specifically for animals :)

### Not yet compatible with Fresh Animations

Images:
![Axolotls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9942c8d72860297d3caae4c3b87280937b25f2a0.png)

![Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bef361f9baf366b9c25e07bb58aa731830cd35d.png)
![Wolf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b6dba058e114e340b99db977ab471f9bbb7e9d3.png)
